meta.notes: Sub-workflow 1d: receives all built-prompt items from orchestrator, filters to persona=study-bard, generates music with Google Lyria 3 Clip, uploads MP3 to Supabase Storage via HTTP Request node (binary data, avoids fetch/Node.js HTTPS), inserts post. Env vars: GEMINI_API_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
